heroHeadline: "Tracking Bad Bunny" Campaign Wins Webby Award as European Tour Leg Approaches May 22
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. DDB Latina Puerto Rico's location-based album-reveal campaign wins Webby Award for Best Fan Engagement (Apr 21). Bloomberg reported on parametric weather insurance behind Colombia concerts (Apr 20); NPR Throughline explored how Bad Bunny made Puerto Rican independence mainstream (Apr 20). European leg begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, Bloomberg, NPR, and major media
